top_signals.title: London Mayor: UK Tops Green Finance Rankings for Eighth Straight Year
top_signals.summary: As the City of London Corporation marks the fifth instalment of the Net Zero Delivery Summit this week, I reflect on the world we were in back in 2022. Only four years ago businesses and communities were recovering from Covid, war had returned to the European continent with the invasion of Ukraine, and surging fuel and food prices were driving global inflation to historic levels. Since then, global instability has only deepened, with conflict in the Middle East and tariff wars disrupting global trade.  We have to face a difficult truth that…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Over 400 ships are waiting near Hormuz for the strait to reopen fully
top_signals.summary: Many tanker operators reluctant to move vessels until Iran and the US strengthen ceasefire deal

top_signals.title: Waller, Policy Risks Have Changed
